title: RFE: podman getconfig <container>
body:
/kind feature

Instead of using ``podman inspect`` command to get an image or a container's config (which is expensive due to the database access and the locks), we could have a command which only access to the Config field.

The command would output the same thing as ``podman inspect --format "{{index .Config}}"<container>``.

comments.body:
Extended commands like should be in the 
```
podman container config 
podman image config
```

I just realized that for me needs, I can use ``podman ps -a --format "{{.Image}}" --filter label=container_name=memcached`` to get the infos that I need instead of the inspect.

I guess I can close it since podman ps seems to provide that easily?
